steps.title: Set up the proportion
steps.content:
The ratio x to y is equivalent to the ratio 12 to t, so:
$$\frac{x}{y} = \frac{12}{t}$$
Substitute x = 156:
$$\frac{156}{y} = \frac{12}{t}$$

steps.title: Cross-multiply and isolate y
steps.content:
Cross-multiplying gives 156t = 12y.
Divide both sides by 12: y = 156t / 12 = 13t.

steps.title: Evaluate each choice
steps.content:
• Choice A: 13t — 156 / (13t) = 12/t ✓. That matches choice A — A is correct.
  • Choice B: 12t — 156 / (12t) = 13/t ≠ 12/t. Eliminated.
  • Choice C: 144t — 156 / (144t) ≠ 12/t. Eliminated.
  • Choice D: 168t — 156 / (168t) ≠ 12/t. Eliminated.
That matches choice A — A is correct.
